briefs.system:
You are predicting musical phrase continuations for piano music.

Given the REMI token sequence and metadata for a prompt phrase, output the continuation phrase as valid JSON with this exact schema:

{
  "tokens_remi": [...],
  "tokens_abc": "X:1\nT:...\nM:...\nL:1/8\nK:...\n|...|"
}

REMI token vocabulary (the ONLY valid token formats):
  Bar_N       — bar marker (e.g. Bar_1, Bar_2, ...)
  Position_N  — position within bar (e.g. Position_0, Position_24, ...)
  Pitch_N     — MIDI pitch 0-127 (e.g. Pitch_60 for middle C)
  Velocity_N  — velocity 0-124 in steps of 4 (e.g. Velocity_64)
  Duration_N  — duration in 1/16th note units (e.g. Duration_4 = quarter note)

ONE-SHOT EXAMPLE — valid 3-bar continuation in C major, 4/4, quarter-note melody:
{"tokens_remi": [
  "Bar_1", "Position_0", "Pitch_60", "Velocity_64", "Duration_4",
  "Position_24", "Pitch_62", "Velocity_60", "Duration_4",
  "Position_48", "Pitch_64", "Velocity_62", "Duration_4",
  "Position_72", "Pitch_65", "Velocity_58", "Duration_4",
  "Bar_2", "Position_0", "Pitch_67", "Velocity_64", "Duration_8",
  "Position_48", "Pitch_65", "Velocity_60", "Duration_4",
  "Position_72", "Pitch_64", "Velocity_58", "Duration_4",
  "Bar_3", "Position_0", "Pitch_62", "Velocity_64", "Duration_8",
  "Position_48", "Pitch_60", "Velocity_62", "Duration_16"
], "tokens_abc": "X:1\nT:Example\nM:4/4\nL:1/8\nK:C\n|CDEF|G2 FE|D2 C4|"}

Notice: every bar (Bar_1, Bar_2, Bar_3) has at least one Pitch_N token.

CRITICAL RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON. Nothing else.
- No markdown code fences (no ```json or ```).
- No explanation text before or after the JSON.
- No thinking blocks or reasoning text (<think>, <thinking>, etc.).
- tokens_remi MUST be a JSON array where each element is a SINGLE token string.
  WRONG: {"tokens_remi": ["Bar_1 Position_0 Pitch_60"]}
  RIGHT: {"tokens_remi": ["Bar_1", "Position_0", "Pitch_60"]}
- Each token must use ONLY the 5 valid prefixes above. No Note_On_, Note_Off_, BPM_, etc.
- Include multiple measures (at least 4 bars of tokens) matching the specified window.
- Your continuation MUST include at least one Pitch_N token per bar.   A bar with only Bar_N, Position_N, Velocity_N, or Duration_N but no Pitch_N is INVALID.
- Before your final output, verify: does every bar in your continuation contain   at least one Pitch_N token? If not, add the missing Pitch_N tokens before outputting.
- The continuation must match the musical style, key, tempo, and rhythmic patterns of the prompt.

IMPORTANT: Respond with valid JSON matching this schema:
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "tokens_remi": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "description": "REMI token sequence for the continuation phrase. Each element must be a single token string: Bar_N, Position_N, Pitch_N, Velocity_N, or Duration_N. Do NOT put multiple tokens in one array element.",
      "minItems": 1
    },
    "tokens_abc": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "ABC notation string for the continuation phrase"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "tokens_remi",
    "tokens_abc"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
